comment: Delivered the tractor right on time and the equipment was in perfect condition. Had a wonderful rental experience overall.
Good experience overall. Was slightly late but the equipment condition was fine. Would consider renting again.
Service was average. The pricing felt a bit high compared to others and communication could have been better.
Excellent farmer to deal with. Equipment was well maintained and he supported us throughout the rental period. Highly recommend.
Delivery was very late and it was difficult to reach him on the phone. The whole process was more stressful than it should have been.
Work was done properly and the equipment was in good shape. There was a slight delay in communication but everything went well.
Outstanding experience. Arrived exactly on time and the rotavator was in perfect working condition. Would definitely rent again.
Average experience. There was a minor issue with the equipment that got resolved later. Communication was just okay.
Very trustworthy person. Gives honest and direct answers to every question. Equipment was in proper condition.
Reliable and focused farmer. Got the thresher on time and completed the field work quickly without any issues.
Had to call multiple times to get a response. Work eventually got done but the experience was quite frustrating.
Absolutely brilliant farmer. Seed drill was in top condition, delivered on time and picked up on time. Full marks without any doubt.
Service was okay but the price negotiation was a bit tough. Equipment condition was acceptable for the work needed.
Good service overall. Sprayer was in working order and delivered on time. Could be a bit more responsive on messages.
Top class farmer. The harvester looked almost brand new, zero problems throughout. Will definitely rent from him again.
Work got done but faced a few hurdles. There was a minor equipment issue which he fixed later. Experience was just average.
Very reliable farmer. Cultivator was in top condition and he responds instantly to any query. Genuinely impressive service.
Overall a good experience. There was a small scheduling issue but it got sorted out quickly. Straightforward and polite person.
Excellent tractor provided. Very fuel efficient and the entire field was completed in a single day. Great farmer to work with.
Delivery took very long and the equipment looked quite worn out. The service fell well below expectations.
Trustworthy and sensible farmer. Disc plough was in good condition and was delivered right on time.
Solid experience. The equipment was clean and well serviced. He was easy to talk to and handled everything professionally.
One of the best rentals I have had. Everything was perfectly arranged, equipment was excellent and no delays at all.
Decent experience but not exceptional. Equipment had some wear and tear. Communication was slow at times.
Very disappointing experience. Equipment broke down mid-work and he was completely unreachable after that. Would not recommend.
Rates were on the higher side for the quality of equipment provided. Service was acceptable but nothing outstanding.
Good farmer to work with. Responded quickly to all messages and the equipment was delivered in clean condition.
Fantastic experience from start to finish. Equipment was top notch and he guided me on how to use it properly as well.
Very good rental experience. Tractor was well maintained and he kept in touch throughout the booking period.
Exceptional farmer. Equipment was spotless, delivery was on time and the whole process was completely hassle free.
